name: Capitol Complex (UNESCO)
description: Le Corbusier's architectural masterpiece and UNESCO World Heritage Site — the seat of government featuring the iconic Open Hand Monument, High Court, and Secretariat buildings.
history: Designed by Swiss-French architect Le Corbusier in the 1950s. Inscribed as UNESCO World Heritage Site in 2016 as an outstanding example of modern architecture.
famousFor: UNESCO World Heritage, Open Hand Monument, and Le Corbusier's modernism.
